site.name: Angul Schools
site.strapline: Angul, Odisha | Know Your School's Performance
site.subtitle: SAKSHAM - Student Assessment for Knowledge, Skills & Competency-based Achievement Mapping
site.description: See how schools in Angul, Odisha are performing on the SAKSHAM assessment.
site.tagline: Because every parent deserves to know

hero.eyebrow: Get Full School's Report Card Here
hero.title: Know Your School's Performance

watch.title: How to read your report card

roles.pageIntro: Choose your role to see what you can do with the data.
roles.backToParent: I'm a parent — take me home

schoolHead.label: School Head
schoolHead.text: Open your school's full report card and compare it with other schools in your block.

villageHead.label: Village Head
villageHead.text: Check how schools in your village are performing and share results at gram sabha meetings.

blockOfficer.label: Block Officer
blockOfficer.text: Access block-wide analytics, subject-wise scores, and downloadable data for all schools.

others.label: Others
others.text: Researchers, NGOs and citizens can explore district-level reports and open data.

find.title: Find your school
find.intro: Search by name, or pick your block.
find.noResults: No schools found. Try a different spelling.

school.comingSoon: The full report card is coming in the next step.

aboutSaksham.title: About SAKSHAM
aboutSaksham.body: Details about the SAKSHAM assessment will appear here soon.

report.overallExplain: The school's average score across all assessed grades and subjects.
report.atBlock: About the same as the block average
report.nearbyLine: {ahead} of {total} nearby schools are ahead of yours
report.nearbyNone: Nearby school results aren't available for comparison.
report.nearbyFar: Note: schools here are spread far apart.
report.fewStudents: This school has too few students to show subject-wise scores while protecting each child's privacy.

guidance.title: Talking to your school
guidance.intro: Many parents use this report to start a friendly conversation. You might ask:
guidance.q1: How is my child doing, and where can they improve?
guidance.q2: What is the school doing to help children learn better?
guidance.q3: How can I support my child's learning at home?
guidance.smc: You can also raise these at a School Management Committee (SMC) meeting, where parents have a say.

compare.title: Compare schools
compare.intro: Pick two schools to see them side by side.
